utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item contains the necessary details: (1) health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health coverage with costs; (2) property_coverage includes home/contents details and costs; (3) travel_coverage includes travel insurance aspects and costs; (4) additional_services are listed with cost information; (5) total_budget provides monthly and annual cost breakdowns. All are fully specified with requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan uses consistently 'Premium' language across health, property, and travel coverage. Based on the plan’s descriptions, each category aligns with the highest-tier (premium) options in the ground-truth data. Specifically: (1) The 'physical_health' plan mentions global network, immediate specialist access, and cardiovascular monitoring — exactly matching EliteCare Premium Plan (rating 10). (2) The 'mental_health' coverage includes family therapy, 24/7 crisis support, and premium features — aligning with EliteCare Premium Plan (rating 10). (3) The 'property_coverage' has luxury item protection, temporary accommodation, and 5% deductible — matching EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 10). (4) The 'travel_coverage' includes global medical evacuation, business travel protection, and trip cancellation — matching EliteTravel Premium Plan (rating 10). (5) The 'additional_services' mention concierge, 24/7 support, and priority claims processing — these features are represented by the Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10) in the 'general_services' section.
